eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Piute, UT; at 12:25 PM on JUN 24, 2026 Effective until 12:25 PM JUN 25, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Piute CO Sheriff/Emergency Management: Cottonwood Fire, Marysvale, UT is in READY status.  Wildfire active nearby; conditions can change quickly. Prepare to leave, and leave early if you feel unsafe. Stay alert and watch local news and cell phone alerts. Pack an emergency kit with medications, documents, water, and supplies. Make a plan and share it with your family and loved ones. Ready your household and pets, and prepare your vehicle to leave quickly. Leave early if you need extra time. Prepare for potential power outage.
